title: Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)
album: I AM...SASHA FIERCE NEW DELUXE EDITION
why_this_song: Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It) by Beyoncé (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

excerpts.text: All the single ladies, all the single ladies
What it really feels like to miss me

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Beyoncé one question about "Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Beyoncé sobre "Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
